pi_items.source: Difficulty is subjective and cannot be objectively verified.

Verified via verifier.py docstring and task context.
Verified via verifier.py logic where passed = score >= 70.
Verified via verifier.py scoring logic which adds up to 100 total points.
Verified via setup_task.sh which programmatically generates this target file from SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d.
Verified via export_result.sh parsing XML tags (pieceOfFurniture, wall, room, label, floorTexture) and verifier.py scoring constraints.

privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated building shell (ski_lodge_starter.sh3d) created by stripping all furniture from the official Sweet Home 3D example SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d. The expected threshold of 70 points out of 100 is explicitly enforced by verifier.py logic. The verification scripts correctly parse the XML structure of the saved .sh3d file to count pieceOfFurniture, wall, room, floorTexture, and label elements, which perfectly aligns with all claimed features required by the task.
